note: Build the cell from structure.lattice_vectors_bohr (the three primitive lattice vectors a1,a2,a3 in Bohr; in DFTK use them as the COLUMNS of the `lattice` matrix) and structure.atom_positions_frac (fractional coordinates, one per atom -- NOT necessarily a single atom). t in grid.csv is fractional along Gamma->endpoint: k_frac = t * endpoint_frac.
